description:
Every AI coding limit, on your Windows 11 taskbar.

CodexWinBar puts your AI coding-provider usage limits directly on the Windows 11 taskbar — embedded next to the system tray — with per-provider session and weekly windows, reset countdowns, credits, an optional usage-pace projection, and live provider-status incidents. Supports Codex, Claude, Copilot, OpenRouter, OpenAI Admin, z.ai, and Cursor.
